import axios from"axios";const API_URL=process.env.NODE_ENV==="production"?"https://ccs-management-backend.vercel.app/api":"/api";// Request interceptor for adding auth token
axios.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem("token");if(token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;},error=>{return Promise.reject(error);});// Response interceptor for handling errors
axios.interceptors.response.use(response=>response,error=>{var _error$response;if(((_error$response=error.response)===null||_error$response===void 0?void 0:_error$response.status)===401){localStorage.removeItem("token");window.location.href="/";}return Promise.reject(error);});// Auth API
export const authAPI={studentLogin:(studentId,password)=>axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/auth/student/login"),{studentId,password}),teacherLogin:(email,password)=>axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/auth/teacher/login"),{email,password}),adminLogin:(username,password)=>axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/auth/admin/login"),{username,password}),getMe:()=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/auth/me")),logout:()=>axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/auth/logout")),changePassword:(currentPassword,newPassword)=>axios.put("".concat(API_URL,"/auth/change-password"),{currentPassword,newPassword})};// Students API

export const teachersAPI={getAll:params=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/teachers"),{params}),getById:id=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/teachers/").concat(id)),getByUserId:userId=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/teachers/user/").concat(userId)),create:data=>axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/teachers"),data),update:(id,data)=>axios.put("".concat(API_URL,"/teachers/").concat(id),data),delete:id=>axios.delete("".concat(API_URL,"/teachers/").concat(id)),updateProfilePicture:(id,formData)=>axios.put("".concat(API_URL,"/teachers/").concat(id,"/profile-picture"),formData,{headers:{"Content-Type":"multipart/form-data"}}),resetPassword:(id,newPassword)=>axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/teachers/").concat(id,"/reset-password"),{newPassword}),toggleCapstoneAvailability:(id,available,schedule)=>axios.put("".concat(API_URL,"/teachers/").concat(id,"/capstone-availability"),{available,schedule}),getCapstoneRequests:id=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/teachers/").concat(id,"/capstone-requests")),updateCapstoneRequest:(groupId,status)=>axios.put("".concat(API_URL,"/teachers/capstone-requests/").concat(groupId),{status}),getAvailableAdvisers:()=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/teachers/capstone-advisers/available"))};// Admin API
export const adminAPI={getStatistics:()=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/admin/statistics")),getUsers:params=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/admin/users"),{params}),updateUserStatus:(id,status)=>axios.put("".concat(API_URL,"/admin/users/").concat(id,"/status"),{status}),unlockUser:id=>axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/admin/users/").concat(id,"/unlock")),getAuditLogs:params=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/admin/audit-logs"),{params}),getSections:()=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/admin/sections")),assignSection:(studentIds,section)=>axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/admin/assign-section"),{studentIds,section}),getViolationTypes:()=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/admin/violations/types")),createAdmin:data=>axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/admin/create-admin"),data),importStudents:students=>axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/admin/import-students"),{students})};// Violations API
export const violationsAPI={getAll:params=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/violations"),{params}),getById:id=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/violations/").concat(id)),create:data=>axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/violations"),data),update:(id,data)=>axios.put("".concat(API_URL,"/violations/").concat(id),data),resolve:(id,remarks)=>axios.put("".concat(API_URL,"/violations/").concat(id,"/resolve"),{remarks}),delete:id=>axios.delete("".concat(API_URL,"/violations/").concat(id)),getByStudent:studentId=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/violations/student/").concat(studentId)),getByUserId:userId=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/violations/user/").concat(userId)),getStats:()=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/violations/stats/summary"))};// Certificates API
export const certificatesAPI={getByStudent:studentId=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/certificates/student/").concat(studentId)),getByUserId:userId=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/certificates/user/").concat(userId)),upload:formData=>axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/certificates/upload"),formData,{headers:{"Content-Type":"multipart/form-data"}}),delete:id=>axios.delete("".concat(API_URL,"/certificates/").concat(id)),getById:id=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/certificates/").concat(id))};// Dashboard API
export const dashboardAPI={getStats:()=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/dashboard/stats")),getStudentsPerYear:()=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/dashboard/charts/students-per-year")),getViolationsSummary:()=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/dashboard/charts/violations-summary")),getFacultyEmployment:()=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/dashboard/charts/faculty-employment")),getViolationsBySection:()=>axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/dashboard/charts/violations-by-section"))};export default{auth:authAPI,students:studentsAPI,teachers:teachersAPI,admin:adminAPI,violations:violationsAPI,certificates:certificatesAPI,dashboard:dashboardAPI};
